payload.description:
As a Plexus developer, I want a runtime architecture diagram for scoring operations, so that I can understand where the scoring pod runs and which control-plane and data-plane services it depends on.

Feature: runtime scoring architecture documentation

Scenario: show the deployed control-plane and data-plane boundaries
Given Plexus scoring runs in a container inside the Tethr Kubernetes cluster hosted in Azure
When a reader opens the runtime scoring architecture diagram
Then the diagram shows the Plexus scoring pod inside the Azure Kubernetes environment
And the diagram shows a GraphQL API in AWS for the control plane
And the diagram identifies Scorecards, Scores, and related control-plane records as living in that AWS GraphQL layer
And the diagram shows an in-cluster API used to access Items, Score Results, and Feedback Items
And the diagram uses the repository's established Excalidraw styling conventions.
payload.title: Specify behavior for runtime scoring architecture diagram
